# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Tenant ID for the subscription"
      }
    },
    "servicePrincipalObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of Service Principal Object IDs that need access"
      }
    },
    "userObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of User Object IDs that need access"
      }
    },
    "enabledForDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Specifies whether Azure Virtual Machines are permitted to retrieve certificates"
      }
    },
    "enabledForDiskEncryption": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Specifies whether Azure Disk Encryption is permitted to retrieve secrets"
      }
    },
    "enabledForTemplateDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Specifies whether Azure Resource Manager is permitted to retrieve secrets"
      }
    },
    "enableRbacAuthorization": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Specifies whether to use RBAC for authorization instead of access policies"
      }
    },
    "enablePublicAccess": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable public network access for development flexibility"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "allObjectIds": "[concat(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds'), parameters('userObjectIds'))]",
    "accessPolicies": {
      "copy": [
        {
          "name": "policies",
          "count": "[length(variables('allObjectIds'))]",
          "input": {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[variables('allObjectIds')[copyIndex('policies')]]",
            "permissions": {
              "keys": [
                "get",
                "list",
                "update",
                "create",
                "import",
                "delete",
                "recover",
                "backup",
                "restore",
                "decrypt",
                "encrypt",
                "unwrapKey",
                "wrapKey",
                "verify",
                "sign",
                "purge"
              ],
              "secrets": [
                "get",
                "list",
                "set",
                "delete",
                "recover",
                "backup",
                "restore",
                "purge"
              ],
              "certificates": [
                "get",
                "list",
                "update",
                "create",
                "import",
                "delete",
                "recover",
                "backup",
                "restore",
                "managecontacts",
                "manageissuers",
                "getissuers",
                "listissuers",
                "setissuers",
                "deleteissuers",
                "purge"
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-02-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "accessPolicies": "[if(parameters('enableRbacAuthorization'), json('[]'), variables('accessPolicies').policies)]",
        "enabledForDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]",
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]",
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "enablePurgeProtection": false,
        "enableRbacAuthorization": "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[if(parameters('enablePublicAccess'), 'Enabled', 'Disabled')]",
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    },
    "keyVaultId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
